subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the All-Merciful! Thy noble father was a lamp of resplendent light and one near to the threshold of his Lord, steadfast in service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه رحمانیه پدر بزرگوار سراج انوار بود و مقرب درگاه پروردگار بخدمت قائم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition
